items.title: vosfs
items.text:
vosfs is the Python package for VOSpace filesystem support.

The project currently exposes a small typed public interface while filesystem features are developed. See the API Reference for the API available in the current source.

To contribute, follow the contributor guide.

items.title: hello()
items.text:
Return the package greeting.

Source code in src/vosfs/__init__.py 
def hello() -> str:
    """Return the package greeting."""
    return "Hello from vosfs!"
